title: T-003 — UI: customer_list_page (SHIP-001) (11-shipping-a)
prompt:
# T-003 — Customer List page UI

PRD: docs/prd/11-SHIPPING-PRD.md §15.4 SHIP-001 (implied via §15.1 desktop screens listing customer list), §3 Personas (shipping_manager read-write, shipping_qa read-only), §11 V-SHIP-SO-01
UX: prototypes/design/11-SHIPPING-UX.md §3 SHIP-001 — Customer List
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/customer-screens.jsx:1-129 (customer_list_page)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Component page `/(shipping)/customers` rendering customer list with search/filter/sort + Create button + paginated table (server-rendered first page, SWR for refresh), matching prototype 1:1 with shadcn primitives.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/(shipping)/customers/page.tsx` (RSC) calls `listCustomers({ search, category, active })` (Drizzle direct query under `withOrgContext`) returning paginated rows.
2. `customer-list-client.tsx` ('use client') wraps SWR for refresh-on-mutation; renders shadcn `Table` with cols: customer_code, name, category, active_orders_count (subquery), last_order_date, is_active badge.
3. Filter chips for category (retail/wholesale/distributor); search input debounced 300 ms; Create button opens `customer_create_modal` (shadcn Dialog from `packages/ui`).
4. Empty / loading / error / permission states all rendered (per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`).
5. Permission gate: page hidden / 403 if session lacks `ship.so.create` OR `ship.dashboard.view` (read-only viewers get `ship.dashboard.view`).
6. i18n via next-intl keys under `shipping.customers.*` (page title, table cols, filters, badge labels).

## Prototype parity
Reference: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/customer-screens.jsx:1-129` (customer_list_page). Required structural elements (verify all):
- Page header with title + Create button (right-aligned)
- Filter chip row (category, is_active, search input)
- Table: customer_code | name | category | active_orders | last_order_date | badge
- Pagination footer (page-N of N + Prev/Next)
- Empty state: "No customers yet" + Create CTA
- Loading state: skeleton rows (8 rows)
- Error state: alert card with retry
- Permission state: 403 card with link to permissions docs

Do not paste prototype JSX wholesale — translate to shadcn + Drizzle.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/customers/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/customers/_components/customer-list-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/customers/_components/__tests__/customer-list-client.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/messages/en/shipping.json [modify — add shipping.customers.* keys]
- apps/web/messages/pl/shipping.json [modify — add shipping.customers.* keys]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/customer-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/customer-screens.jsx:1-129 (customer_list_page), then it has the same header + Create button + filter chip row + 6-col table + pagination footer — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist (structural + visual + interaction) and Playwright trace screenshot.
2. Given URL `?search=acme&category=wholesale`, when page renders, then only wholesale customers matching 'acme' appear (server-rendered, no client-side filter).
3. Given session has only `ship.dashboard.view` (no ship.so.create), when page renders, then Create button is hidden and the page renders read-only.
4. Given the data layer returns empty, when page renders, then empty state card shows "No customers yet" + Create CTA (CTA hidden if no permission).
5. Given Playwright trace is captured, when reviewed, then it shows all four states (empty/loading/error/permission) per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.
6. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright unavailable, document blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL test asserting parity (header/filters/table/pagination/empty state/permission gate) + URL filter behavior + Playwright trace stub.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run customer-list-client.test.tsx`.
- Playwright spec `apps/web/e2e/shipping-customers.spec.ts` (uses T-123 harness) captures four-state evidence.

## Risk red lines
- Do not use HTML `<select>` instead of shadcn `Select`.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to shadcn primitives only.
- Do not import `@radix-ui/react-dialog` outside `packages/ui` (foundation §0 ESLint rule).
- Do not hard-code customer category enum; consume from a typed const shared with T-001 Drizzle schema.
- Do not regress accessibility (axe violations = fail).

pipeline_inputs.description: SHIP-001 Customer List page (RSC + SWR client) matching customer_list_page prototype, with 4-state coverage + i18n.
pipeline_inputs.details: Strict prototype parity to `customer-screens.jsx:1-129`. RSC data fetch via Drizzle under withOrgContext. Permission gate (ship.so.create for write, ship.dashboard.view for read). i18n keys shipping.customers.* PL/EN. UI evidence per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.
out_of_scope: Do not implement Server Actions here (T-002).
Do not build customer detail page (T-004).
Do not implement allergen restrictions sub-modal here (T-005).
cross_module_dependencies: 01-npd/T-001 (product FG SSOT — variance_tolerance_pct + allergen attributes; coverage hygiene per R3 audit 2026-05-14)

Given URL ?search=acme&category=wholesale AND session has only ship.dashboard.view (no ship.so.create), when page renders, then only matching customers appear (server-rendered) AND Create button is hidden and page is read-only.
Given empty data set, when page renders, then empty state shows 'No customers yet' + Create CTA (hidden when no permission).

Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then Playwright trace shows all four states (empty/loading/error/permission) per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md; if Playwright is unavailable, blocker is documented and RTL/snapshot fallback evidence is attached.
test_strategy: RED: RTL test asserting parity + URL filters + permission gate + four-state rendering.
Playwright spec apps/web/e2e/shipping-customers.spec.ts captures four-state evidence.

Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate per shadcn primitives.
Do not import @radix-ui/react-dialog outside packages/ui (foundation §0 ESLint rule).
Do not hard-code customer category enum; share with T-001 Drizzle schema.
Do not regress accessibility (axe violations = fail).
